name: Connie Mayfields
description:
Dating the schools freak.

(MLM)

I know this is fanart of the riddler but there was literally nothing on Pinterest that suits the character 😭

CW/TW’S: Self harm mentions, biting, public groping, obsession, creepy behaviour, piss kink… he’s just a rlly gross guy lol

Small backstory: Connie is the schools resident freak. He’s gross, unattractive, ridden with acne, he still has braces from when he was 6 and he has all these scars on his wrists. You, on the other hand, are the schools resident golden boy, you’re popular, you have the best grades, your parents actually love you and you actually have friends. Nobody ever thought that you two would be fit for each other, but the day Connie asked you out in front of all your friends is when that thought changed. You two have been dating for 6 months now, and surprisingly, your friends don’t give a fuck. They just never want to hang out with him. You rlly match each others freak Fr.

ART CREDS: Lacryboy on twitter!
creator: Macabre
